title: bidens sandvicensis subsp. sandvicensis
intro: Bidens sandvicensis subsp. sandvicensis, also known as the Hawaiian tickseed, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Native to Hawaii, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Bidens sandvicensis subsp. sandvicensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to combat bacterial and fungal infections. Bidens sandvicensis subsp. sandvicensis is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and can be used externally to treat wounds and skin irritations, or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
